name: shopify-embedded-app-verify
description: Agentic verify loop for Shopify embedded apps — drives the real, authenticated Shopify admin in the developer's own browser via CDP.

browser.title: Browser
browser.description: comet | chrome | chromium | brave | edge — or an absolute path to any Chromium-based browser binary

mode.title: Session mode
mode.description: attach = your daily browser + its logged-in session (browser must allow CDP on the default profile, e.g. Comet). profile = dedicated automation profile, one-time Shopify login (works with every Chromium; required for Chrome/Edge).

cdp_port.title: CDP port
cdp_port.description: Local Chrome DevTools Protocol port the browser listens on
